creator: bp@butya.kz
text:
Name of vm-zone passed to zinit(). In 'nfs.ko' module zone name located
in static KLD's memory. This causes problems after KLD is unloaded because
'zname' now points to an invalid memory region.

Fix: 

Not sure, but probably pointer to zname should be allocated
dynamically or, better have something like zuninit() function.
How-To-Repeat: 
	kldload nfs.ko
	sysctl vm.zone /* that works now */
	kldunload nfs.ko
	sysctl vm.zone /* and now we got a panic */
